rules.rule: All using directives must be placed at the top of the file, outside any namespace block.
using directives must be ordered in groups: (1) System, (2) Microsoft, (3) third-party, (4) project-local.
Each using group must be separated from the next by exactly one blank line.
Directives within each group must be sorted alphabetically.
Unused using directives must be removed from the file.
